[SQL: SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count

GROUP BY ownerid;]

result.preview: "There are no owner transfer records in the case history table, so no agent has any transfer counts. As a result, it is not possible to identify an agent with the fewest transfer counts over the last 4 quarters among those who handled more than 0 cases."

args.answer: There are no owner transfer records in the case history table, so no agent has any transfer counts. As a result, it is not possible to identify an agent with the fewest transfer counts over the last 4 quarters among those who handled more than 0 cases.
